revision.comment: Created page with "-- Module:GaiadDate (minimal & hardened) local p = {} -- Defaults: change names if you like local DEFAULT_MONTHS = { "Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini","Cancer", "Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Sagittarius","Ophiuchus" } local DEFAULT_WEEKDAYS = { "Sun","Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri","Sat" } -- Helpers local function lang() return mw.getContentLanguage() end local function toUnix(ts) return tonumber(lang():formatDate('U', ts)) end local functio..."
revision.text:
-- Module:GaiadDate (minimal & hardened) local p = {}
-- Defaults: change names if you like local DEFAULT_MONTHS = { "Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini","Cancer", "Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Sagittarius","Ophiuchus" } local DEFAULT_WEEKDAYS = { "Sun","Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri","Sat" }
-- Helpers local function lang() return mw.getContentLanguage() end local function toUnix(ts) return tonumber(lang():formatDate('U', ts)) end local function ymd(y,m,d) return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", y, m, d) end
local function parseISO(s) if not s or s == "" then return nil end s = s:gsub("/", "-") -- Accept only YYYY-MM-DD if not s:match("^%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%d$") then return nil end return s end
local function splitCSV(str, want) if not str or str == "" then return nil end local t = {} for part in mw.text.gsplit(str, ",", true) do table.insert(t, mw.text.trim(part)) end if want and #t ~= want then return nil end return t end
local function parseAnchor(anchorStr) -- Accept "MM-DD" or "YYYY-MM-DD"; default Dec 21 if absent/bad if type(anchorStr) == "string" and anchorStr:match("^%d%d?[-/]%d%d?$") then local m, d = anchorStr:match("^(%d%d?)[-/](%d%d?)$") return tonumber(m), tonumber(d) elseif type(anchorStr) == "string" and anchorStr:match("^%d%d%d%d[-/]%d%d[-/]%d%d$") then local y, m, d = anchorStr:match("^(%d%d%d%d)[-/](%d%d)[-/](%d%d)$") return tonumber(m), tonumber(d), tonumber(y) else return 12, 21, nil -- default: Dec 21 end end
-- Core converter: 13×28=364; epagomenal = spanDays-364 local function convertCore(opts) local months = splitCSV(opts.monthsCSV, 13) or DEFAULT_MONTHS local wdays = splitCSV(opts.weekdaysCSV, 7) or DEFAULT_WEEKDAYS
-- 1) Pick date: given or today local dateISO = parseISO(opts.dateISO) or lang():formatDate('Y-m-d') local Y = tonumber(lang():formatDate('Y', dateISO))
-- 2) Find anchor for cycle local aM, aD, aY = parseAnchor(opts.anchor) local anchorThis = ymd(Y, aM, aD) local anchorPrev = ymd(Y-1, aM, aD) local anchorNext = ymd(Y+1, aM, aD)
local dateU = toUnix(dateISO) local aThisU = toUnix(anchorThis) local aPrevU = toUnix(anchorPrev) local aNextU = toUnix(anchorNext)
local startU, startY, endU if dateU >= aThisU then startU, startY, endU = aThisU, Y, aNextU else startU, startY, endU = aPrevU, Y-1, aThisU end
-- 3) Span & epagomenal count local spanDays = math.floor((endU - startU) / 86400 + 0.00001) -- 365 or 366 local epag = math.max(0, spanDays - 364)
-- 4) Position in cycle local daysSince = math.floor((dateU - startU) / 86400 + 0.00001) -- 0-based if daysSince < 0 then daysSince = 0 end
-- Year label: start year (change to "end" if you want) local gaiadYear = startY
-- 5) Map if daysSince >= 364 then local idx = math.min(daysSince - 364 + 1, epag) return { kind="epag", epagIndex=idx, epagTotal=epag, gaiadYear=gaiadYear, cycleDays=spanDays } end
local doy = daysSince + 1 -- 1..364 local monthIdx = math.floor((doy - 1)/28) + 1 -- 1..13 local dayInMon = ((doy - 1) % 28) + 1 local wIx = ((doy - 1) % 7) + 1 local weekNo = math.floor((doy - 1)/7) + 1
return { kind="regular", gaiadYear=gaiadYear, dayOfYear=doy, weekNo=weekNo, weekdayIx=wIx, weekday=wdays[wIx], monthIdx=monthIdx, month=months[monthIdx] or ("Month "..monthIdx), dayInMonth=dayInMon, } end
local function render(r) if r.kind == "epag" then return string.format("Epagomenal Day %d of %d • Year %d", r.epagIndex or 1, r.epagTotal or 1, r.gaiadYear or 0) else return string.format("%s %d, Year %d (Day %d, Week %d, %s)", r.month, r.dayInMonth, r.gaiadYear, r.dayOfYear, r.weekNo, r.weekday) end end
-- Public entry: {{#invoke:GaiadDate|convert|date=YYYY-MM-DD|anchor=MM-DD|months=csv|weekdays=csv|format=long|json=1}} function p.convert(frame) local args = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local r = convertCore{ dateISO = args.date or args[1], anchor = args.anchor, monthsCSV = args.months, weekdaysCSV = args.weekdays, } local fmt = (args.format or "long"):lower() if fmt == "parts" then if r.kind == "epag" then return table.concat({"Epagomenal", r.epagIndex or 1, r.epagTotal or 1, r.gaiadYear or 0}, "|") else return table.concat({ r.month, r.dayInMonth, r.gaiadYear, r.dayOfYear, r.weekNo, r.weekday, r.monthIdx, r.weekdayIx }, "|") end else return render(r) end end
-- {{#invoke:GaiadDate|today|anchor=MM-DD}} function p.today(frame) local args = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args -- Call convertCore directly to avoid parent-arg pitfalls local r = convertCore{ dateISO = nil, -- force "today" anchor = args.anchor, monthsCSV = args.months, weekdaysCSV = args.weekdays, } return render(r) end
-- Quick self-test: {{#invoke:GaiadDate|selftest}} function p.selftest(frame) local out = {} local sample = { "2024-12-21","2025-01-01","2025-06-01","2025-12-20" } for _,d in ipairs(sample) do local r = convertCore{ dateISO=d, anchor="12-21" } table.insert(out, d .. " → " .. render(r)) end return table.concat(out, "\n") end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 calendar -- Rules: -- ISO Year = o (ISO week-year) + 10000 -- Month = min(13, floor((W-1)/4)+1) -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus -- Day = ((W-1) % 4) * 7 + N -- N is ISO weekday (1..7, Mon..Sun)
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
local function compute(ts, y, m, d) ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil -- nil → "now" in formatDate local W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) or 1 -- ISO week (01..53) local N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) or 1 -- ISO weekday (1..7, Mon..Sun) local O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) or 1970 -- ISO week-year
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx > 13 then monthIdx = 13 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000
return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR (for easy debugging if needed) return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 calendar -- Rules: -- ISO Year = o (ISO week-year) + 10000 -- Month = min(13, floor((W-1)/4)+1) -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus -- Day = ((W-1) % 4) * 7 + N -- N is ISO weekday (1..7, Mon..Sun)
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus", "Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
local function compute(ts, y, m, d) ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil -- nil → "now" in formatDate local W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) or 1 -- ISO week (01..53) local N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) or 1 -- ISO weekday (1..7, Mon..Sun) local O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) or 1970 -- ISO week-year
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx > 13 then monthIdx = 13 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000
return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR (for easy debugging if needed) return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
local function compute(ts, y, m, d) ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil -- nil => "now" local W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) or 1 -- 01..53 local N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) or 1 -- 1..7 (Mon..Sun) local O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) or 1970 -- ISO week-year
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 -- allows 14 when W=53 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end
local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N -- for W=53, day = N (1..7) local yearOut = O + 10000
return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported
revision.text:
-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
local function compute(ts, y, m, d) ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil -- nil => "now" local W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) or 1 -- 01..53 local N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) or 1 -- 1..7 (Mon..Sun) local O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) or 1970 -- ISO week-year
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 -- allows 14 when W=53 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end
local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N -- for W=53, day = N (1..7) local yearOut = O + 10000
return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

revision.comment: version that should work with earlier dates
revision.text:
-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
-- ===== Pure-Lua ISO helpers (robust for ancient years) ===== local function isLeap(y) return (y % 4 == 0) and ((y % 100 ~= 0) or (y % 400 == 0)) end
local cumdays = {0,31,59,90,120,151,181,212,243,273,304,334} local function dayOfYear(y,m,d) local doy = cumdays[m] + d if m > 2 and isLeap(y) then doy = doy + 1 end return doy end
-- Tomohiko Sakamoto; returns ISO 1..7 (Mon..Sun) local function dowMon1(y,m,d) local t = {0,3,2,5,0,3,5,1,4,6,2,4} if m < 3 then y = y - 1 end local w = (y + math.floor(y/4) - math.floor(y/100) + math.floor(y/400) + t[m] + d) % 7 return (w == 0) and 7 or w end
local function isoWeeksInYear(y) local jan1 = dowMon1(y, 1, 1) -- 1..7 if jan1 == 4 or (jan1 == 3 and isLeap(y)) then return 53 end return 52 end
local function isoWeekDate(y,m,d) local N = dowMon1(y,m,d) -- 1..7 (Mon..Sun) local doy = dayOfYear(y,m,d) local W = math.floor((doy - N + 10) / 7) local O = y local weeksY = isoWeeksInYear(y)
if W < 1 then O = y - 1 W = isoWeeksInYear(O) elseif W > weeksY then O = y + 1 W = 1 end return W, N, O end
-- ===== Core compute ===== local function compute(ts, y, m, d) -- Prefer explicit Y/M/D (avoids formatDate crash on ancient years) local yN, mN, dN = tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d) if yN and mN and dN then local W, N, O = isoWeekDate(yN, mN, dN) local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
-- Otherwise: try MediaWiki date parser; if it fails, fallback by parsing ts ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil -- nil => "now"
local W, N, O local okW, vW = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) end) local okN, vN = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) end) local okO, vO = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) end)
if okW and okN and okO and vW and vN and vO then W, N, O = vW, vN, vO else -- Fallback: parse YYYY-MM-DD from ts and do pure-Lua if type(ts) == "string" then local yy, mm, dd = ts:match("^(%d%d%d%d)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$") if yy and mm and dd then W, N, O = isoWeekDate(tonumber(yy), tonumber(mm), tonumber(dd)) end end -- If still nil, use "now" via formatDate (should be safe) if not (W and N and O) then W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W')) or 1 N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N')) or 1 O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o')) or 1970 end end
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
-- ===== Public API ===== function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
-- Convert historical year numbering (… -2, -1, 1, 2 …; no year 0) -- to astronomical numbering (… -1, 0, 1, 2 …; year 0 == 1 BCE) local function toAstronomicalYear(y) y = tonumber(y) if not y then return nil end if y <= 0 then return y + 1 end -- -1 (1 BCE) -> 0, -2 (2 BCE) -> -1, etc. return y end
-- ===== Robust civil date ⇄ day-number (Hinnant) ===== -- days_from_civil: astronomical year local function days_from_civil(y, m, d) y = y - (m <= 2 and 1 or 0) local era = (y >= 0) and math.floor(y/400) or math.floor((y-399)/400) local yoe = y - era*400 local doy = math.floor((153 * (m + (m > 2 and -3 or 9)) + 2) / 5) + d - 1 local doe = yoe*365 + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100) + doy return era*146097 + doe - 719468 end
-- civil_from_days: returns astronomical y, m, d local function civil_from_days(z) z = z + 719468 local era = (z >= 0) and math.floor(z/146097) or math.floor((z-146096)/146097) local doe = z - era*146097 local yoe = math.floor((doe - math.floor(doe/1460) + math.floor(doe/36524) - math.floor(doe/146096)) / 365) local y = yoe + era*400 local doy = doe - (365*yoe + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100)) local mp = math.floor((5*doy + 2)/153) local dd = doy - math.floor((153*mp + 2)/5) + 1 local mm = (mp < 10) and (mp + 3) or (mp - 9) y = y + ((mm <= 2) and 1 or 0) return y, mm, dd end
-- ISO week: returns W (1..53), N (1..7 Mon..Sun), O (ISO week-year; astronomical) local function isoWeekDateAstr(yA, m, d) local z = days_from_civil(yA, m, d) local N = ((z + 3) % 7) + 1 -- 1970-01-01 is Thu (ISO 4) local th = z + (4 - N) -- shift to Thursday of this week local yW = civil_from_days(th) -- ISO week-year = Gregorian year of that Thursday local firstTh = days_from_civil(yW, 1, 4) -- Jan 4 is always in week 1 local W = 1 + math.floor((th - firstTh)/7) return W, N, yW end
-- ===== Core compute ===== local function compute(ts, y, m, d) local yN, mN, dN = tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)
-- If explicit y/m/d given: do pure-Lua math (safe for BCE & ancient) if yN and mN and dN then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(yN) local W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, mN, dN) local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 -- O may be 0 for 1 BCE → 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
-- Otherwise allow 'date=' or 'now' via MediaWiki; protect with pcall ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil local W, N, O local okW, vW = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) end) local okN, vN = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) end) local okO, vO = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) end)
if okW and okN and okO and vW and vN and vO then W, N, O = vW, vN, vO else -- Fallback: try parsing ts as YYYY-MM-DD and use pure-Lua if type(ts) == "string" then local yy, mm, dd = ts:match("^(%-?%d+)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$") if yy and mm and dd then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(tonumber(yy)) W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, tonumber(mm), tonumber(dd)) end end -- Last resort: use "now" if not (W and N and O) then W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W')) or 1 N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N')) or 1 O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o')) or 1970 end end
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
-- ===== Public API ===== function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
-- Convert historical year numbering (… -2, -1, 1, 2 …; no year 0) -- to astronomical numbering (… -1, 0, 1, 2 …; year 0 == 1 BCE) local function toAstronomicalYear(y) y = tonumber(y) if not y then return nil end if y <= 0 then return y + 1 end -- -1 (1 BCE) -> 0, -2 (2 BCE) -> -1, etc. return y end
-- ===== Robust civil date ⇄ day-number (Hinnant) ===== -- days_from_civil: astronomical year local function days_from_civil(y, m, d) y = y - (m <= 2 and 1 or 0) local era = (y >= 0) and math.floor(y/400) or math.floor((y-399)/400) local yoe = y - era*400 local doy = math.floor((153 * (m + (m > 2 and -3 or 9)) + 2) / 5) + d - 1 local doe = yoe*365 + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100) + doy return era*146097 + doe - 719468 end
-- civil_from_days: returns astronomical y, m, d local function civil_from_days(z) z = z + 719468 local era = (z >= 0) and math.floor(z/146097) or math.floor((z-146096)/146097) local doe = z - era*146097 local yoe = math.floor((doe - math.floor(doe/1460) + math.floor(doe/36524) - math.floor(doe/146096)) / 365) local y = yoe + era*400 local doy = doe - (365*yoe + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100)) local mp = math.floor((5*doy + 2)/153) local dd = doy - math.floor((153*mp + 2)/5) + 1 local mm = (mp < 10) and (mp + 3) or (mp - 9) y = y + ((mm <= 2) and 1 or 0) return y, mm, dd end
-- ISO week: returns W (1..53), N (1..7 Mon..Sun), O (ISO week-year; astronomical) local function isoWeekDateAstr(yA, m, d) local z = days_from_civil(yA, m, d) local N = ((z + 3) % 7) + 1 -- 1970-01-01 is Thu (ISO 4) local th = z + (4 - N) -- shift to Thursday of this week local yW = civil_from_days(th) -- ISO week-year = Gregorian year of that Thursday local firstTh = days_from_civil(yW, 1, 4) -- Jan 4 is always in week 1 local W = 1 + math.floor((th - firstTh)/7) return W, N, yW end
-- ===== Core compute ===== local function compute(ts, y, m, d) local yN, mN, dN = tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)
-- If explicit y/m/d given: do pure-Lua math (safe for BCE & ancient) if yN and mN and dN then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(yN) local W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, mN, dN) local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 -- O may be 0 for 1 BCE → 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
-- Otherwise allow 'date=' or 'now' via MediaWiki; protect with pcall ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil local W, N, O local okW, vW = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) end) local okN, vN = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) end) local okO, vO = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) end)
if okW and okN and okO and vW and vN and vO then W, N, O = vW, vN, vO else -- Fallback: try parsing ts as YYYY-MM-DD and use pure-Lua if type(ts) == "string" then local yy, mm, dd = ts:match("^(%-?%d+)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$") if yy and mm and dd then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(tonumber(yy)) W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, tonumber(mm), tonumber(dd)) end end -- Last resort: use "now" if not (W and N and O) then W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W')) or 1 N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N')) or 1 O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o')) or 1970 end end
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
-- ===== Public API ===== function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
-- Convert historical year numbering (… -2, -1, 1, 2 …; no year 0) -- to astronomical numbering (… -1, 0, 1, 2 …; year 0 == 1 BCE) local function toAstronomicalYear(y) y = tonumber(y) if not y then return nil end if y <= 0 then return y + 1 end -- -1 (1 BCE) -> 0, -2 (2 BCE) -> -1, etc. return y end
-- ===== Robust civil date ⇄ day-number (Hinnant) ===== -- days_from_civil: astronomical year local function days_from_civil(y, m, d) y = y - (m <= 2 and 1 or 0) local era = (y >= 0) and math.floor(y/400) or math.floor((y-399)/400) local yoe = y - era*400 local doy = math.floor((153 * (m + (m > 2 and -3 or 9)) + 2) / 5) + d - 1 local doe = yoe*365 + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100) + doy return era*146097 + doe - 719468 end
-- civil_from_days: returns astronomical y, m, d local function civil_from_days(z) z = z + 719468 local era = (z >= 0) and math.floor(z/146097) or math.floor((z-146096)/146097) local doe = z - era*146097 local yoe = math.floor((doe - math.floor(doe/1460) + math.floor(doe/36524) - math.floor(doe/146096)) / 365) local y = yoe + era*400 local doy = doe - (365*yoe + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100)) local mp = math.floor((5*doy + 2)/153) local dd = doy - math.floor((153*mp + 2)/5) + 1 local mm = (mp < 10) and (mp + 3) or (mp - 9) y = y + ((mm <= 2) and 1 or 0) return y, mm, dd end
-- ISO week: returns W (1..53), N (1..7 Mon..Sun), O (ISO week-year; astronomical) local function isoWeekDateAstr(yA, m, d) local z = days_from_civil(yA, m, d) local N = ((z + 3) % 7) + 1 -- 1970-01-01 is Thu (ISO 4) local th = z + (4 - N) -- shift to Thursday of this week local yW = civil_from_days(th) -- ISO week-year = Gregorian year of that Thursday local firstTh = days_from_civil(yW, 1, 4) -- Jan 4 is always in week 1 local W = 1 + math.floor((th - firstTh)/7) return W, N, yW end
-- ===== Core compute ===== local function compute(ts, y, m, d) local yN, mN, dN = tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)
-- If explicit y/m/d given: do pure-Lua math (safe for BCE & ancient) if yN and mN and dN then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(yN) local W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, mN, dN) local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 -- O may be 0 for 1 BCE → 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
-- Otherwise allow 'date=' or 'now' via MediaWiki; protect with pcall ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil local W, N, O local okW, vW = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) end) local okN, vN = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) end) local okO, vO = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) end)
if okW and okN and okO and vW and vN and vO then W, N, O = vW, vN, vO else -- Fallback: try parsing ts as YYYY-MM-DD and use pure-Lua if type(ts) == "string" then local yy, mm, dd = ts:match("^(%-?%d+)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$") if yy and mm and dd then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(tonumber(yy)) W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, tonumber(mm), tonumber(dd)) end end -- Last resort: use "now" if not (W and N and O) then W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W')) or 1 N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N')) or 1 O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o')) or 1970 end end
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
-- ===== Public API ===== function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
-- Convert historical year numbering (… -2, -1, 1, 2 …; no year 0) -- to astronomical numbering (… -1, 0, 1, 2 …; year 0 == 1 BCE) local function toAstronomicalYear(y) y = tonumber(y) if not y then return nil end if y <= 0 then return y + 1 end -- -1 (1 BCE) -> 0, -2 (2 BCE) -> -1, etc. return y end
-- ===== Robust civil date ⇄ day-number (Hinnant) ===== -- days_from_civil: astronomical year local function days_from_civil(y, m, d) y = y - (m <= 2 and 1 or 0) local era = (y >= 0) and math.floor(y/400) or math.floor((y-399)/400) local yoe = y - era*400 local doy = math.floor((153 * (m + (m > 2 and -3 or 9)) + 2) / 5) + d - 1 local doe = yoe*365 + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100) + doy return era*146097 + doe - 719468 end
-- civil_from_days: returns astronomical y, m, d local function civil_from_days(z) z = z + 719468 local era = (z >= 0) and math.floor(z/146097) or math.floor((z-146096)/146097) local doe = z - era*146097 local yoe = math.floor((doe - math.floor(doe/1460) + math.floor(doe/36524) - math.floor(doe/146096)) / 365) local y = yoe + era*400 local doy = doe - (365*yoe + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100)) local mp = math.floor((5*doy + 2)/153) local dd = doy - math.floor((153*mp + 2)/5) + 1 local mm = (mp < 10) and (mp + 3) or (mp - 9) y = y + ((mm <= 2) and 1 or 0) return y, mm, dd end
-- ISO week: returns W (1..53), N (1..7 Mon..Sun), O (ISO week-year; astronomical) local function isoWeekDateAstr(yA, m, d) local z = days_from_civil(yA, m, d) local N = ((z + 3) % 7) + 1 -- 1970-01-01 is Thu (ISO 4) local th = z + (4 - N) -- shift to Thursday of this week local yW = civil_from_days(th) -- ISO week-year = Gregorian year of that Thursday -- Find Thursday of week 1: Jan 4 is always in week 1, find its Thursday local jan4 = days_from_civil(yW, 1, 4) local jan4_weekday = ((jan4 + 3) % 7) + 1 local firstTh = jan4 + (4 - jan4_weekday) -- Thursday of week containing Jan 4 local W = 1 + math.floor((th - firstTh)/7) return W, N, yW end
-- ===== Core compute ===== local function compute(ts, y, m, d) local yN, mN, dN = tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)
-- If explicit y/m/d given: do pure-Lua math (safe for BCE & ancient) if yN and mN and dN then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(yN) local W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, mN, dN) local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 -- O may be 0 for 1 BCE → 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
-- Otherwise allow 'date=' or 'now' via MediaWiki; protect with pcall ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil local W, N, O local okW, vW = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) end) local okN, vN = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) end) local okO, vO = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) end)
if okW and okN and okO and vW and vN and vO then W, N, O = vW, vN, vO else -- Fallback: try parsing ts as YYYY-MM-DD and use pure-Lua if type(ts) == "string" then local yy, mm, dd = ts:match("^(%-?%d+)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$") if yy and mm and dd then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(tonumber(yy)) W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, tonumber(mm), tonumber(dd)) end end -- Last resort: use "now" if not (W and N and O) then W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W')) or 1 N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N')) or 1 O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o')) or 1970 end end
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
-- ===== Public API ===== function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
-- Convert historical year numbering (… -2, -1, 1, 2 …; no year 0) -- to astronomical numbering (… -1, 0, 1, 2 …; year 0 == 1 BCE) local function toAstronomicalYear(y) y = tonumber(y) if not y then return nil end if y <= 0 then return y + 1 end -- -1 (1 BCE) -> 0, -2 (2 BCE) -> -1, etc. return y end
-- ===== Robust civil date ⇄ day-number (Hinnant) ===== -- days_from_civil: astronomical year local function days_from_civil(y, m, d) y = y - (m <= 2 and 1 or 0) local era = (y >= 0) and math.floor(y/400) or math.floor((y-399)/400) local yoe = y - era*400 local doy = math.floor((153 * (m + (m > 2 and -3 or 9)) + 2) / 5) + d - 1 local doe = yoe*365 + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100) + doy return era*146097 + doe - 719468 end
-- civil_from_days: returns astronomical y, m, d local function civil_from_days(z) z = z + 719468 local era = (z >= 0) and math.floor(z/146097) or math.floor((z-146096)/146097) local doe = z - era*146097 local yoe = math.floor((doe - math.floor(doe/1460) + math.floor(doe/36524) - math.floor(doe/146096)) / 365) local y = yoe + era*400 local doy = doe - (365*yoe + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100)) local mp = math.floor((5*doy + 2)/153) local dd = doy - math.floor((153*mp + 2)/5) + 1 local mm = (mp < 10) and (mp + 3) or (mp - 9) y = y + ((mm <= 2) and 1 or 0) return y, mm, dd end
-- ISO week: returns W (1..53), N (1..7 Mon..Sun), O (ISO week-year; astronomical) local function isoWeekDateAstr(yA, m, d) local z = days_from_civil(yA, m, d) local N = ((z + 3) % 7) + 1 -- 1970-01-01 is Thu (ISO 4) local th = z + (4 - N) -- shift to Thursday of this week local yW = civil_from_days(th) -- ISO week-year = Gregorian year of that Thursday -- Find Thursday of week 1: Jan 4 is always in week 1, find its Thursday local jan4 = days_from_civil(yW, 1, 4) local jan4_weekday = ((jan4 + 3) % 7) + 1 local firstTh = jan4 + (4 - jan4_weekday) -- Thursday of week containing Jan 4 local W = 1 + math.floor((th - firstTh)/7) return W, N, yW end
-- ===== Core compute ===== local function compute(ts, y, m, d) local yN, mN, dN = tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)
-- If explicit y/m/d given: do pure-Lua math (safe for BCE & ancient) if yN and mN and dN then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(yN) local W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, mN, dN) local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 -- O may be 0 for 1 BCE → 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
-- Otherwise allow 'date=' or 'now' via MediaWiki; protect with pcall ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil local W, N, O local okW, vW = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) end) local okN, vN = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) end) local okO, vO = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) end)
if okW and okN and okO and vW and vN and vO then W, N, O = vW, vN, vO else -- Fallback: try parsing ts as YYYY-MM-DD and use pure-Lua if type(ts) == "string" then local yy, mm, dd = ts:match("^(%-?%d+)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$") if yy and mm and dd then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(tonumber(yy)) W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, tonumber(mm), tonumber(dd)) end end -- Last resort: use "now" if not (W and N and O) then W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W')) or 1 N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N')) or 1 O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o')) or 1970 end end
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', month, day, yearOut) end
-- ===== Public API ===== function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
-- Convert historical year numbering (… -2, -1, 1, 2 …; no year 0) -- to astronomical numbering (… -1, 0, 1, 2 …; year 0 == 1 BCE) local function toAstronomicalYear(y) y = tonumber(y) if not y then return nil end if y <= 0 then return y + 1 end -- -1 (1 BCE) -> 0, -2 (2 BCE) -> -1, etc. return y end
-- ===== Robust civil date ⇄ day-number (Hinnant) ===== -- days_from_civil: astronomical year local function days_from_civil(y, m, d) y = y - (m <= 2 and 1 or 0) local era = (y >= 0) and math.floor(y/400) or math.floor((y-399)/400) local yoe = y - era*400 local doy = math.floor((153 * (m + (m > 2 and -3 or 9)) + 2) / 5) + d - 1 local doe = yoe*365 + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100) + doy return era*146097 + doe - 719468 end
-- civil_from_days: returns astronomical y, m, d local function civil_from_days(z) z = z + 719468 local era = (z >= 0) and math.floor(z/146097) or math.floor((z-146096)/146097) local doe = z - era*146097 local yoe = math.floor((doe - math.floor(doe/1460) + math.floor(doe/36524) - math.floor(doe/146096)) / 365) local y = yoe + era*400 local doy = doe - (365*yoe + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100)) local mp = math.floor((5*doy + 2)/153) local dd = doy - math.floor((153*mp + 2)/5) + 1 local mm = (mp < 10) and (mp + 3) or (mp - 9) y = y + ((mm <= 2) and 1 or 0) return y, mm, dd end
-- ISO week: returns W (1..53), N (1..7 Mon..Sun), O (ISO week-year; astronomical) local function isoWeekDateAstr(yA, m, d) local z = days_from_civil(yA, m, d) local N = ((z + 3) % 7) + 1 -- 1970-01-01 is Thu (ISO 4) local th = z + (4 - N) -- shift to Thursday of this week local yW = civil_from_days(th) -- ISO week-year = Gregorian year of that Thursday -- Find Thursday of week 1: Jan 4 is always in week 1, find its Thursday local jan4 = days_from_civil(yW, 1, 4) local jan4_weekday = ((jan4 + 3) % 7) + 1 local firstTh = jan4 + (4 - jan4_weekday) -- Thursday of week containing Jan 4 local W = 1 + math.floor((th - firstTh)/7) return W, N, yW end
-- ===== Core compute ===== local function compute(ts, y, m, d) local yN, mN, dN = tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)
-- If explicit y/m/d given: do pure-Lua math (safe for BCE & ancient) if yN and mN and dN then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(yN) local W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, mN, dN) local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 -- O may be 0 for 1 BCE → 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
-- Otherwise allow 'date=' or 'now' via MediaWiki; protect with pcall ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil local W, N, O local okW, vW = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) end) local okN, vN = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) end) local okO, vO = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) end)
if okW and okN and okO and vW and vN and vO then W, N, O = vW, vN, vO else -- Fallback: try parsing ts as YYYY-MM-DD and use pure-Lua if type(ts) == "string" then local yy, mm, dd = ts:match("^(%-?%d+)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$") if yy and mm and dd then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(tonumber(yy)) W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, tonumber(mm), tonumber(dd)) end end -- Last resort: use "now" if not (W and N and O) then W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W')) or 1 N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N')) or 1 O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o')) or 1970 end end
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], [[%d GE]]', month, day, yearOut) end
-- ===== Public API ===== function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p

revision.comment: 10 revisions imported: I also might find a use for these here so importing in case
revision.text:
-- Module:GaiadDate — ISO week math → 13×28 (+Horus) calendar -- Year = ISO week-year (o) + 10000 -- Month = floor((W-1)/4)+1 -- 1=Sagittarius … 13=Ophiuchus, 14=Horus (for W=53) -- Day = ((W-1) % 4)*7 + N
local p = {}
local MONTHS = { "Sagittarius","Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini", "Cancer","Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Horus" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
local function ymd(y,m,d) if not (y and m and d) then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)) end
-- Convert historical year numbering (… -2, -1, 1, 2 …; no year 0) -- to astronomical numbering (… -1, 0, 1, 2 …; year 0 == 1 BCE) local function toAstronomicalYear(y) y = tonumber(y) if not y then return nil end if y <= 0 then return y + 1 end -- -1 (1 BCE) -> 0, -2 (2 BCE) -> -1, etc. return y end
-- ===== Robust civil date ⇄ day-number (Hinnant) ===== -- days_from_civil: astronomical year local function days_from_civil(y, m, d) y = y - (m <= 2 and 1 or 0) local era = (y >= 0) and math.floor(y/400) or math.floor((y-399)/400) local yoe = y - era*400 local doy = math.floor((153 * (m + (m > 2 and -3 or 9)) + 2) / 5) + d - 1 local doe = yoe*365 + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100) + doy return era*146097 + doe - 719468 end
-- civil_from_days: returns astronomical y, m, d local function civil_from_days(z) z = z + 719468 local era = (z >= 0) and math.floor(z/146097) or math.floor((z-146096)/146097) local doe = z - era*146097 local yoe = math.floor((doe - math.floor(doe/1460) + math.floor(doe/36524) - math.floor(doe/146096)) / 365) local y = yoe + era*400 local doy = doe - (365*yoe + math.floor(yoe/4) - math.floor(yoe/100)) local mp = math.floor((5*doy + 2)/153) local dd = doy - math.floor((153*mp + 2)/5) + 1 local mm = (mp < 10) and (mp + 3) or (mp - 9) y = y + ((mm <= 2) and 1 or 0) return y, mm, dd end
-- ISO week: returns W (1..53), N (1..7 Mon..Sun), O (ISO week-year; astronomical) local function isoWeekDateAstr(yA, m, d) local z = days_from_civil(yA, m, d) local N = ((z + 3) % 7) + 1 -- 1970-01-01 is Thu (ISO 4) local th = z + (4 - N) -- shift to Thursday of this week local yW = civil_from_days(th) -- ISO week-year = Gregorian year of that Thursday -- Find Thursday of week 1: Jan 4 is always in week 1, find its Thursday local jan4 = days_from_civil(yW, 1, 4) local jan4_weekday = ((jan4 + 3) % 7) + 1 local firstTh = jan4 + (4 - jan4_weekday) -- Thursday of week containing Jan 4 local W = 1 + math.floor((th - firstTh)/7) return W, N, yW end
-- ===== Core compute ===== local function compute(ts, y, m, d) local yN, mN, dN = tonumber(y), tonumber(m), tonumber(d)
-- If explicit y/m/d given: do pure-Lua math (safe for BCE & ancient) if yN and mN and dN then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(yN) local W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, mN, dN) local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 -- O may be 0 for 1 BCE → 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
-- Otherwise allow 'date=' or 'now' via MediaWiki; protect with pcall ts = ts or ymd(y,m,d) or nil local W, N, O local okW, vW = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('W', ts)) end) local okN, vN = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('N', ts)) end) local okO, vO = pcall(function() return tonumber(L():formatDate('o', ts)) end)
if okW and okN and okO and vW and vN and vO then W, N, O = vW, vN, vO else -- Fallback: try parsing ts as YYYY-MM-DD and use pure-Lua if type(ts) == "string" then local yy, mm, dd = ts:match("^(%-?%d+)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$") if yy and mm and dd then local yA = toAstronomicalYear(tonumber(yy)) W, N, O = isoWeekDateAstr(yA, tonumber(mm), tonumber(dd)) end end -- Last resort: use "now" if not (W and N and O) then W = tonumber(L():formatDate('W')) or 1 N = tonumber(L():formatDate('N')) or 1 O = tonumber(L():formatDate('o')) or 1970 end end
local monthIdx = math.floor((W - 1) / 4) + 1 if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 14 then monthIdx = 14 end local dayInMon = ((W - 1) % 4) * 7 + N local yearOut = O + 10000 return MONTHS[monthIdx], dayInMon, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O end
local function render(month, day, yearOut) return string.format('[[%s %d]], [[%d GE]]', month, day, yearOut) end
-- ===== Public API ===== function p.convert(frame) local a = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O = compute(a.date, a.y, a.m, a.d) if (a.format or ""):lower() == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|MONTHIDX|W|N|ISOYEAR return table.concat({month, day, yearOut, monthIdx, W, N, O}, "|") end return render(month, day, yearOut) end
function p.today(frame) local month, day, yearOut = compute(nil, nil, nil, nil) return render(month, day, yearOut) end
return p
